feed.title: Nearby in Košice
feed.empty: No posts yet. Be the first!
feed.allSolved: All caught up — every request has been solved. Check the archive below.

new.title: New post
new.placeholder: What do you need or offer?
new.queued: Saved — will send when you're online
new.errorVoice: Voice input not supported in this browser
new.fromSearchHint: From your search — edit before posting
new.urgencyOffHint: We'll notify neighbours who are free right now.
new.urgencyOnHint: Every helper in this category will be alerted right away, even if it's their off-hours.

resources.title: Local resources
resources.subtitle: Verified places that help in Košice

search.placeholder: What do you need to find?
search.noResults: Nothing found. Try different words or another language.

offlineNudge.title: Showing top matches only — you're offline
offlineNudge.body: Go online to see more results and to post a new request to the community.

askCommunity.emptyTitle: No one has posted about this yet
askCommunity.emptyBody: Ask the community for help with “{{query}}”. Neighbours nearby can answer.
askCommunity.followupBody: If none of these match, post your question and the community can reply.
askCommunity.categoryHint: We'll suggest the {{emoji}} {{category}} category — you can change it.
askCommunity.offlineHint: You're offline. Come back online to post this to the community.

settings.title: Settings
settings.aboutText: OmniBridge connects neighbours, refugees and older residents for local help — with voice, icons and translation.
settings.offlinePackError: Offline pack download failed. Check your connection.
settings.offlineDemoHint: Simulates being offline for demos. Feed, search and read-aloud keep working.
settings.fontSizeHint: Make every label, post and reply bigger. Takes effect right away.
settings.reducedMotionOn: On — following your device setting. Animations are simplified.
settings.reducedMotionOff: Off — change this in your device settings if animations bother you.

helper.title: Helping neighbours
helper.hint: When you're free and a post matches what you can help with, we'll send a notification. You decide when to reply.
helper.enabledHintOn: On — we'll ping you for matching posts at the times you picked.
helper.enabledHintOff: Off — you won't get match pings. Reply notifications still work.

points.title: Your thank-you points
points.hint: You earn points each time a neighbour marks your help as complete.
points.zeroHint: Reply to a post to earn your first thank-you points.
points.milestone: That's a lot of help — thank you!

responses.yourPost: This is your post — replies appear here.
responses.demoHint: Send a real Web Push to this device to demo the flow
responses.yesICanHelpHint: One tap lets the asker know. They can then send you a private message.
responses.offerBody: I can help with this. Send me a private message to arrange a time.
responses.offerReceivedBody: Tap below to send a private message and arrange a time.
responses.privateHint: Only you and {{name}} can see these messages.
responses.offerSent: Thanks — the asker has been notified

onboarding.title: Welcome to OmniBridge
onboarding.subtitle: Pick your language and tell us what to call you.
onboarding.nameHint: Shown on your posts and replies. You can change it later in Settings.

helper.title: Can you help your neighbours sometimes?
helper.subtitle: We'll only ping you when a neighbour posts something that matches what you can help with — and only when you said you're free.
helper.tagsHint: Tap any that sound like you. Tap again to remove.
helper.availabilityHint: Tap the times that fit. We never share your schedule.

notifications.sectionHint: Get pinged on this device the moment a neighbour replies — even when OmniBridge is closed.
notifications.askTitle: Want to know when neighbours reply?
notifications.askBody: We'll send a notification straight to this phone — no email, no spam.
notifications.successBody: We'll notify you the moment someone replies to one of your posts.
notifications.deniedBody: Enable them in your browser settings (Site settings → Notifications) and come back here.
notifications.installTitle: Add OmniBridge to your Home Screen first
notifications.installBody: On iPhone, notifications work only after installing the app to your Home Screen via the Share menu → Add to Home Screen.
notifications.statusInstallNeeded: Install to Home Screen to enable

push.offerReceivedBody: Open the post to send a private message.

postCard.alertedNoneOutsideHours: Saved — helpers will see it in the morning
postCard.alertedNoneNoHelpers: Saved — no volunteers signed up yet for this kind of request
postCard.alertedNoneBusy: Saved — no neighbours are free right now

resolve.dialogHint: Pick the neighbour who helped. They'll get a thank-you and {{points}} points.
resolve.noHelperHint: Close the post without sending a thank-you.
resolve.noResponders: No one has replied yet. You can still close the post — neighbours will see it's solved.
resolve.solvedLocked: This request is closed — thanks to everyone who pitched in.
resolve.toastError: Couldn't mark as solved. Try again?

listen.heroHint: Tap, speak, and hear a neighbour who can help — in your language.
listen.tapToSpeak: Tap and tell me what you need
listen.thinking: Looking for neighbours who can help…
listen.instructions: Press the big button and say one sentence — for example, "I need a ride to the clinic."
listen.askCommunityInstead: None of these fit — ask the community
listen.noMatchTitle: No neighbour has posted about this yet
listen.noMatchBody: We couldn't find a match for “{{query}}”. Let's ask the community — we've filled in what you said.
listen.noMatchSpoken: No neighbour has answered this yet. Let's ask the community.
listen.keyboardLabel: Type what you need help with
listen.keyboardPlaceholder: For example, I need help with groceries on Tuesdays
listen.errorVoice: Voice input didn't work. Use the keyboard option below.
listen.errorSearch: Something went wrong finding a neighbour. Please try again.
